hero.title: Nurse call systems that save time and lives
hero.subtitle: BEST develops intelligent call and alarm systems for hospitals, psychiatric wards and elderly care — designed side-by-side with healthcare professionals.

trustBar.title: Trusted by leading healthcare institutions across the Nordics

productLines.title: A complete ecosystem for healthcare communication
productLines.subtitle: From the patient's bedside to the nurse's smartphone — everything works seamlessly together.

solutions.title: Solutions tailored to your institution
solutions.hospitalDesc: Scalable call systems for everything from ICUs to closed psychiatric wards.
solutions.healthInstitutionDesc: User-friendly systems with assault alarm, emergency call and mobile alert handling.
solutions.nursingHomeDesc: Wireless alarm systems with NFC presence verification and keyless room access.

caseStudies.title: Reference projects
caseStudies.subtitle: Scandinavia's largest hospitals have chosen BEST.

recommender.title: Find the right solution for your institution
recommender.subtitle: Answer three questions — we'll recommend a fitting product bundle.

contactCta.title: Ready to upgrade your nurse call?
contactCta.subtitle: We have the expertise and product range to cover everything from small assisted-living units to university hospitals.

meta.title: Best Teleprodukter — Intelligent nurse call
